name: cst226 Touch Screen Controller
description: The `cst226` touchscreen platform allows using the touch screen controllers based on the cst226 chip with ESPHome. The [I²C](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) is required to be set up in your configuration for this touchscreen to work.

config_entries.label: Interrupt Pin
config_entries.description: The touch detection pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Reset Pin
config_entries.description: The chip reset pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually set the ID of this touchscreen.

config_entries.label: X Max
config_entries.description: The raw value corresponding to the right

config_entries.label: X Min
config_entries.description: The raw value corresponding to the left

config_entries.label: Y Max
config_entries.description: The raw value corresponding to the bottom

config_entries.label: Y Min
config_entries.description: The raw value corresponding to the top
